1.1.1.Name: Blood Essentialism
1.1.1.Definition: "We are the Blood." Defining the Who by genetic purity.

1.1.2.Name: Nativism
1.1.2.Definition: "Only the Born belong." Rejecting the naturalized or the outsider.

1.1.3.Name: Apartheid
1.1.3.Definition: "How you live depends on Who you are." Legal stratification of identity.

1.1.4.Name: Segregation
1.1.4.Definition: "They live There, we live Here." Physical mapping of identity.

1.1.5.Name: Hate
1.1.5.Definition: "We hate them because they are Vermin." Visceral disgust.

1.1.6.Name: Vendetta
1.1.6.Definition: "We define ourselves by the wound they gave us." Identity as trauma.

1.1.7.Name: Civil War
1.1.7.Definition: "One of us must die." The logic of elimination.

1.2.1.Name: Status Zero
1.2.1.Definition: "I am nothing." The loss of role/job/dignity.

1.2.2.Name: The Vagrant
1.2.2.Definition: "I have no name/address." Humans with no legal or physical standing.

1.2.3.Name: Criminalized
1.2.3.Definition: "My existence is illegal." Laws against being poor/homeless.

1.2.4.Name: No Man's Land
1.2.4.Definition: Living in the camp, the border zone, the place that is not a place.

1.2.5.Name: Alienation
1.2.5.Definition: "I feel like a stranger in my home." Psychic displacement.

1.2.6.Name: Rootlessness
1.2.6.Definition: "I come from nowhere." Severed from ancestors/land.

1.2.7.Name: Exile
1.2.7.Definition: "I am cast out." Physical expulsion from the tribe.

1.3.1.Name: Helplessness
1.3.1.Definition: "Nothing I do matters." The collapse of Agency.

1.3.2.Name: Suicide
1.3.2.Definition: "I must end the Who." Active destruction of the self.

1.3.3.Name: Silence
1.3.3.Definition: "I have no voice." The cessation of culture/art.

1.3.4.Name: Sterility
1.3.4.Definition: "No life here." Refusal to reproduce in this space.

1.3.6.Name: Fatalism
1.3.6.Definition: "It was meant to be." Surrender to Doom.

1.4.1.Name: Echo Chamber
1.4.1.Definition: Listening only to the Self reflected back.

1.4.2.Name: The Hermit
1.4.2.Definition: Physical isolation. "No one is with me."

1.4.3.Name: Distrust
1.4.3.Definition: "I cannot rely on you." The breakdown of social method.

1.4.4.Name: Transaction
1.4.4.Definition: "The Market is everywhere." Relationships reduced to price.

1.4.7.Name: Anomie
1.4.7.Definition: "There are no norms." Chaos of the soul.

1.5.1.Name: The Libel
1.5.1.Definition: Defining the Enemy via lies (e.g. "They eat children").

1.5.2.Name: The Purge
1.5.2.Definition: Physically removing the "Who" labeled as Enemy.

1.5.3.Name: Witch Hunt
1.5.3.Definition: The public spectacle of finding the Enemy.

1.5.5.Name: Projection
1.5.5.Definition: Blaming the Enemy for own sins.

1.5.7.Name: Sacrifice
1.5.7.Definition: Killing the Enemy to save the State (Magical Thinking).

1.6.1.Name: THE TROJAN HORSE
1.6.1.Definition: "The Ruler is a Spy." The Leader serves the Enemy.

1.6.2.Name: Influence
1.6.2.Definition: "Their ideas are here." Adopting Enemy narratives.

1.7.1.Name: Fiat
1.7.1.Definition: "My Word is Law." Definition via Will.

1.7.2.Name: Force
1.7.2.Definition: "I rule because I am Strong." Police State.

1.7.3.Name: Emergency
1.7.3.Definition: "Crisis allows me to do this." Permanent Exception.

1.7.5.Name: The Cult
1.7.5.Definition: "I am God." Worship of the Leader.

1.7.6.Name: The Purge
1.7.6.Definition: Eliminating rivals to secure the Chair.

2.1.1.Name: Incommensurability
2.1.1.Definition: The inability to define value or truth across the divide. Language breaks down; words mean opposite things to each side.

2.1.2.Name: Demonization
2.1.2.Definition: Defining the Other not as "Wrong" but as "Evil/Unreal." They are NPCs or demons, removing the moral obligation to treat them as human.

2.1.3.Name: Propaganda
2.1.3.Definition: The manufacturing of a synthetic reality (The Narrative) to replace organic truth. Information is weaponized to define "What is true."

2.1.4.Name: The Filter Bubble
2.1.4.Definition: The physical/digital separation of data-space. One literally never encounters a definition that contradicts the Tribe's reality.

2.1.5.Name: Cynicism
2.1.5.Definition: The belief that Truth is impossible, so one might as well choose the most convenient Lie.

2.1.6.Name: Conspiracy
2.1.6.Definition: Defining all events as the result of a secret, malevolent plot. The rejection of randomness or error.

2.1.7.Name: Cold War
2.1.7.Definition: The mental state of total hostility. Shared reality is annihilated; total bifurcation of the "What."

2.2.1.Name: Nullification
2.2.1.Definition: The refusal to recognize the definition of the Central Law. "That law does not exist here."

2.2.2.Name: Disloyalty
2.2.2.Definition: Transferring the definition of Authority from the State to the Local Chief/Warlord.

2.2.3.Name: Decree
2.2.3.Definition: The Law is defined simply by the Will of the Ruler ("Because I said so"). It loses its objective structure.

2.2.4.Name: Secession
2.2.4.Definition: Redefining the border. "The Law stops here." The physical contraction of the legal space.

2.2.5.Name: Illegitimacy
2.2.5.Definition: Defining the Ruler as fake/fraudulent, thus voiding all their laws.

2.2.6.Name: Usurpation
2.2.6.Definition: Claiming the title was stolen in the past, making the current definition void.

2.2.7.Name: Anarchy
2.2.7.Definition: The absence of any definition. No one knows "What" the rules are.

2.3.1.Name: Doubt
2.3.1.Definition: The deliberate manufacture of uncertainty. "We don't know What it is." Stalling action via confusion.

2.3.2.Name: Denial
2.3.2.Definition: Rejecting the definition because it comes from Them. "If they say X, X is false."

2.3.3.Name: The Power Lie
2.3.3.Definition: Lying not to deceive, but to demonstrate power over the definition of reality. "It is true because I say it is."

2.3.4.Name: Relativism
2.3.4.Definition: "Truth depends on where you stand." The rejection of objective fact for subjective narrative.

2.3.5.Name: Nihilism
2.3.5.Definition: The rejection of the concept of Truth itself. "Nothing is true, everything is permitted."

2.3.6.Name: Gaslighting
2.3.6.Definition: Rewriting the past definition to make the victim question their sanity. "That never happened."

2.3.7.Name: Delusion
2.3.7.Definition: The population lives in a fantasy world unrelated to physical parameters.

2.4.1.Name: Speculation
2.4.1.Definition: Defining value as "What the next person will pay." The economy becomes a casino/bet.

2.4.2.Name: Subsistence
2.4.2.Definition: Value is reduced to "Staying Alive." The total collapse of surplus and complex trade.

2.4.3.Name: Counterfeiting
2.4.3.Definition: The proliferation of fake value. "How is it made?" It's not real.

2.4.4.Name: Barter
2.4.4.Definition: Value only exists "Here and Now" in physical goods (cigarettes, bullets).

2.4.5.Name: Unknown
2.4.5.Definition: The Price Mechanism fails. No one knows "Why" it costs X. Allocation chaos.

2.4.6.Name: Short-Termism
2.4.6.Definition: Value is defined only in the immediate moment. No investment in the future.

2.4.7.Name: Debasement
2.4.7.Definition: The Ruler dilutes the definition of the coin, stealing wealth from all holders.

2.5.1.Name: Selective Justice
2.5.1.Definition: "Show me the man, I'll show you the crime." The definition of crime becomes fluid/weaponized.

2.5.3.Name: Indictment
2.5.3.Definition: Using the process of charging as the punishment itself.

2.5.4.Name: Seizure
2.5.4.Definition: Taking the property/land of the rival. Justice defined as looting.

2.5.5.Name: Vengeance
2.5.5.Definition: The court exists to inflict pain, not to restore balance.

2.5.6.Name: Breach
2.5.6.Definition: Breaking the historical definition/norm (Precedent) to win the current round.

2.5.7.Name: Tyranny
2.5.7.Definition: The Law is defined simply as the Will of the Strongest.

2.6.1.Name: Deadlock
2.6.1.Definition: The system acts to stop itself. "What is done?" Nothing. Functional paralysis.

2.6.2.Name: The Mob
2.6.2.Definition: The definition of power moves from the Institution to the Crowd (Force).

2.6.3.Name: Martial Law
2.6.3.Definition: The State is defined by the Gun. Suspension of civil definition.

2.6.4.Name: Dual Power
2.6.4.Definition: Two Capitols, Two Kings. The definition of the Center is split.

2.6.5.Name: Panic
2.6.5.Definition: The fear that the Definition (Order) is dissolving into Void.

2.6.6.Name: The Coup
2.6.6.Definition: Seizing the definition of the State illegal means.

2.6.7.Name: Dictatorship
2.6.7.Definition: The State is defined as One Man.

2.7.1.Name: Vetoed
2.7.1.Definition: We cannot define our own policy. A foreign power holds the pen.

2.7.2.Name: The Occupier
2.7.2.Definition: The Enemy defines the rules on our soil.

2.7.3.Name: Vassalage
2.7.3.Definition: We act as a Puppet. We execute the Will of Another.

2.7.4.Name: Debt Slavery
2.7.4.Definition: Our resources go "There" (to the Creditor). We do not own our output.

2.7.5.Name: Inferiority
2.7.5.Definition: We define ourselves as lesser than the Empire. Cultural cringe.

2.7.6.Name: Assimilation
2.7.6.Definition: We are eaten. Our definition merges into Theirs.

2.7.7.Name: Extinction
2.7.7.Definition: The Nation ceases to sustain a definition. It disappears from the map.

3.1.1.Name: Price Blindness
3.1.1.Definition: We don't know "What" it costs anymore. Inflation destroys signal.

3.1.2.Name: Starvation
3.1.2.Definition: The people ("Who") cease to eat. Biological failure.

3.1.5.Name: Panic
3.1.5.Definition: Buying because of fear. Run on goods.

3.1.7.Name: Autarky
3.1.7.Definition: Closing the border. No trade come in.

3.2.1.Name: Jurisdiction Clash
3.2.1.Definition: "What law applies here?" Conflict of Sovereigns.

3.2.2.Name: Infiltration
3.2.2.Definition: The Enemy is inside the border.

3.2.3.Name: Language Death
3.2.3.Definition: We speak Their tongue here now.

3.2.7.Name: Annexation
3.2.7.Definition: The Map changes. We are gone.

3.3.1.Name: Austerity
3.3.1.Definition: Cutting "What" we need to pay the debt.

3.3.2.Name: Peonage
3.3.2.Definition: We work for the Bank, not ourselves.

3.3.3.Name: Tribute
3.3.3.Definition: Paying protection money to the Empire.

3.3.5.Name: Shame
3.3.5.Definition: The humiliation of being a beggar nation.

3.3.6.Name: Usury
3.3.6.Definition: Interest that can never be repaid. Trap.

3.3.7.Name: Default
3.3.7.Definition: Total credit collapse. Expulsion from system.

3.4.1.Name: Obsolescence
3.4.1.Definition: "What is this?" It is old junk. Outdated tech.

3.4.6.Name: Ruins
3.4.6.Definition: Living in the wreckage of the past.

3.5.1.Name: Rent-Seeking
3.5.1.Definition: Charging for access to "What" was free.

3.5.2.Name: Enclosure
3.5.2.Definition: Fencing off the land meant for All.

3.5.3.Name: Corruption
3.5.3.Definition: Selling the public asset to a crony.

3.5.5.Name: Greed
3.5.5.Definition: "Because I want it." Private gain > Public good.

3.5.7.Name: Neo-Feudalism
3.5.7.Definition: Society divides into Owners and Renters.

3.6.1.Name: Smuggling
3.6.1.Definition: Trade moves to the dark. Contraband.

3.6.2.Name: Scarcity
3.6.2.Definition: "Who" has it? No one. Lack of goods.

3.6.4.Name: Blockade
3.6.4.Definition: Physical ring of steel. Nothing comes in.

3.6.5.Name: Victimhood
3.6.5.Definition: "They did this to us." External blame.

3.7.4.Name: Barter
3.7.4.Definition: Value is in the physical object here.

3.7.5.Name: Anxiety
3.7.5.Definition: Value is fleeing. Fear of zero.

4.1.1.Name: Justification
4.1.1.Definition: "Pain is necessary." Using logic/science to explain why cruelty is good.

4.1.3.Name: Hate Speech
4.1.3.Definition: Naming the victim as vermin to bypass empathy.

4.1.5.Name: Sadism
4.1.5.Definition: "Because I enjoy it." Pleasure derived from suffering.

4.1.6.Name: The Cycle
4.1.6.Definition: "They did it to us." Repeating the trauma loop.

4.1.7.Name: Evil
4.1.7.Definition: Alignment with pure destruction vs Life.

4.2.2.Name: The Ghetto
4.2.2.Definition: "They belong There." Physical containment of the unclean.

4.2.3.Name: The Slur
4.2.3.Definition: Normalizing derogatory language to strip dignity.

4.2.4.Name: Disenfranchised
4.2.4.Definition: Stripping the right to speak/vote in "This Place."

4.2.6.Name: Scapegoating
4.2.6.Definition: Blaming the Other for the failures of the Self.

4.2.7.Name: Ethnostate
4.2.7.Definition: The goal of total racial purity.

4.3.1.Name: Double Standard
4.3.1.Definition: One set of rules for Rulers, another for Ruled.

4.3.2.Name: Luxury
4.3.2.Definition: The Leaders feast while the People starve.

4.3.3.Name: Gaslighting
4.3.3.Definition: Denying the privilege to the face of the poor.

4.3.4.Name: Immunity
4.3.4.Definition: The Law does not apply "Up Here."

4.3.7.Name: Decadence
4.3.7.Definition: The rot of the elite collapses the structure.

4.4.1.Name: Market Fundamentalism
4.4.1.Definition: "Price is the only Value." Commodification of all life.

4.5.1.Name: Treason
4.5.1.Definition: Lending aid and comfort to the Enemy.

4.5.3.Name: Denunciation
4.5.3.Definition: Reporting family/friends to the Secret Police.

4.5.4.Name: Selling Out
4.5.4.Definition: Trading national interest for foreign cash.

4.5.5.Name: Perfidy
4.5.5.Definition: Acting in bad faith to gain advantage.

4.5.7.Name: Apostasy
4.5.7.Definition: Abandoning the Creed/Faith of the nation.

4.6.1.Name: Neutrality
4.6.1.Definition: "Good and Evil are equal." Refusal to judge.

4.6.2.Name: Inaction
4.6.2.Definition: Standing by while another is killed.

4.6.3.Name: Silence
4.6.3.Definition: Refusing to speak up against power.

4.6.4.Name: The Bystander
4.6.4.Definition: Watching the crime from the sidelines.

4.7.4.Name: The Bunker
4.7.4.Definition: Hiding to survive the coming doom.

4.7.6.Name: Paranoia
4.7.6.Definition: "It is all a plot against me."

4.7.7.Name: Submission
4.7.7.Definition: "I obey to stay safe." Police State.

5.1.1.Name: Anti-Expertise
5.1.1.Definition: Purging the "Knower." Replacing skill with loyalty. Defining expertise as a threat.

5.1.2.Name: Incompetence
5.1.2.Definition: The Idiot rules. The basic inability to perform the functions of office.

5.1.3.Name: Cronyism
5.1.3.Definition: Promoting friends regardless of "How" well they perform.

5.1.4.Name: Kleptocracy
5.1.4.Definition: The budget goes "There" (to the Ruler's pocket). State as piggy bank.

5.1.5.Name: Malice
5.1.5.Definition: Ruling to hurt. Active hatred of the population.

5.1.6.Name: Nepotism
5.1.6.Definition: Power flows through the bloodline, not merit.

5.1.7.Name: Madness
5.1.7.Definition: The Executive mind is broken/insane. Chaos ensues.

5.2.1.Name: The Veto
5.2.1.Definition: One voice can say No, blocking the Will of the Many.

5.2.2.Name: Shutdown
5.2.2.Definition: No one works. The machinery of state halts.

5.2.3.Name: Red Tape
5.2.3.Definition: The process is the punishment. Forms/Rules prevent action.

5.2.4.Name: The Filibuster
5.2.4.Definition: The bill dies Here. Minority obstruction.

5.2.5.Name: Obstruction
5.2.5.Definition: Blocking for spite/political gain, not policy.

5.2.6.Name: Delay
5.2.6.Definition: Waiting out the clock. Justice delayed is justice denied.

5.3.1.Name: Classified
5.3.1.Definition: "You cannot see What we do." Over-classification to hide incompetence.

5.3.2.Name: Black Site
5.3.2.Definition: "Who is there?" No one. Secret prisons where law does not exist.

5.3.3.Name: Newspeak
5.3.3.Definition: Speaking to confuse. Using words to hide meaning rather than reveal it.

5.3.4.Name: Dark Money
5.3.4.Definition: "Where did the cash come from?" Unknown. Secret funding of power.

5.3.5.Name: Distrust
5.3.5.Definition: Assuming the people are the enemy. The Secret List.

5.3.6.Name: The Cover-Up
5.3.6.Definition: Creating a meta-crime to hide the original crime.

5.3.7.Name: Shadow State
5.3.7.Definition: Real power operates invisibly (Deep State/Intel Agencies).

5.4.1.Name: Quid Pro Quo
5.4.1.Definition: "This for That." Use of office for personal exchange.

5.4.2.Name: Pay-to-Play
5.4.2.Definition: Access is sold to the highest bidder (Donor).

5.4.3.Name: Bribery
5.4.3.Definition: Cash for outcome. The direct purchase of the State.

5.4.4.Name: Lobbying
5.4.4.Definition: Law is written "There" (in the Corporation's office).

5.4.5.Name: Mercenary
5.4.5.Definition: Loyalty is rented, not owned. Fighting for money.

5.4.6.Name: The Spoils
5.4.6.Definition: "To the victor go the spoils." Looting the state after winning.

5.4.7.Name: Kleptocracy
5.4.7.Definition: The State exists solely to facilitate theft.

5.5.1.Name: Deregulation
5.5.1.Definition: Removing the rules that protect life. "What rules?"

5.5.2.Name: Poisoning
5.5.2.Definition: Allowing the citizenry to be poisoned for profit.

5.5.3.Name: Capture
5.5.3.Definition: The Regulator is controlled by the Regulated.

5.5.4.Name: Revolving Door
5.5.4.Definition: Officials leave office to work "There" (for the companies they policed).

5.5.5.Name: Complicity
5.5.5.Definition: The State helps the Corporation kill/steal.

5.5.7.Name: Corp-State
5.5.7.Definition: The merger of State and Corporate power (Fascism).

5.6.1.Name: The Fraud
5.6.1.Definition: Business as deceit. The Contract is a trick.

5.6.2.Name: The Brute
5.6.2.Definition: The Strongest rules. Violence is the only vote.

5.6.4.Name: The Raid
5.6.4.Definition: Wealth is taken from "There" to "Here". Predation.

5.6.5.Name: Cruelty
5.6.5.Definition: Enjoying the pain of others. Sadism as status.

5.6.6.Name: Recruitment
5.6.6.Definition: Indoctrinating youth into violence. Child Soldiers.

5.6.7.Name: Warlordism
5.6.7.Definition: The State breaks into rival gangs.

5.7.1.Name: Doublethink
5.7.1.Definition: Holding two contradictory thoughts at once.

5.7.4.Name: The Bunker
5.7.4.Definition: Hiding from reality in a hole.

6.1.1.Name: Lost Cause
6.1.1.Definition: "We didn't lose, we were cheated." Reframing defeat.

6.1.2.Name: Fabrication
6.1.2.Definition: Inventing a divine origin for the Leader.

6.1.3.Name: The Textbook
6.1.3.Definition: Teaching lies to children to enforce loyalty.

6.1.7.Name: Chosen People
6.1.7.Definition: "God selected us." Divine right excuses crimes.

6.2.1.Name: Censorship
6.2.1.Definition: Removing the Event from the record.

6.2.2.Name: Book Burning
6.2.2.Definition: Destroying the physical carriers of memory.

6.2.3.Name: Silence
6.2.3.Definition: "We do not speak of it." Enforced forgetting.

6.2.4.Name: Iconoclasm
6.2.4.Definition: Smashing the statues/art of the past.

6.2.5.Name: Damnatio Memoriae
6.2.5.Definition: Striking the Name so they never existed.

6.2.6.Name: Whitewashing
6.2.6.Definition: Cleaning the blood history to look pure.

6.2.7.Name: Oblivion
6.2.7.Definition: Total cultural amnesia. Civilization forgets itself.

6.3.1.Name: Traditionalism
6.3.1.Definition: Rejecting the Modern for the Archaic.

6.3.2.Name: Re-enactment
6.3.2.Definition: Living in the past identity physically.

6.3.3.Name: Revival
6.3.3.Definition: Using dead language/symbols to signal purity.

6.3.4.Name: Restoration
6.3.4.Definition: Trying to put the old map back together.

6.3.5.Name: Grievance
6.3.5.Definition: "They stole our glory." Politics of sadness.

6.3.6.Name: Reaction
6.3.6.Definition: Moving Backward in time as policy.

6.3.7.Name: Stasis
6.3.7.Definition: Refusal to evolve or adapt. Petrified state.

6.4.2.Name: The Purge
6.4.2.Definition: Mass killing of the Scapegoat class.

6.4.3.Name: Witch Hunt
6.4.3.Definition: The public trial of the innocent.

6.4.5.Name: Projection
6.4.5.Definition: "They are doing what we are actually doing."

6.5.2.Name: Repetition
6.5.2.Definition: Doing the same fatal thing again.

6.5.6.Name: Short Attention
6.5.6.Definition: Inability to focus on long timeframes.

6.5.7.Name: Sleepwalking
6.5.7.Definition: Drifting into dooms hidden in the past.

6.6.5.Name: Fanaticism
6.6.5.Definition: Willingness to kill for the Idea.

6.7.5.Name: The Hero
6.7.5.Definition: "Only I know the truth." Gnostic pride.

7.1.2.Name: The Wall
7.1.2.Definition: Physical barriers to stop the world.

7.3.1.Name: Concession
7.3.1.Definition: Giving "What" they want to feed the beast.

1.1.1.Name: Blood Essentialism
1.1.1.Definition: "We are the Blood." Defining the Who by genetic purity.

1.1.2.Name: Nativism
1.1.2.Definition: "Only the Born belong." Rejecting the naturalized or the outsider.

1.1.3.Name: Apartheid
1.1.3.Definition: "How you live depends on Who you are." Legal stratification of identity.

1.1.4.Name: Segregation
1.1.4.Definition: "They live There, we live Here." Physical mapping of identity.

1.1.5.Name: Hate
1.1.5.Definition: "We hate them because they are Vermin." Visceral disgust.

1.1.6.Name: Vendetta
1.1.6.Definition: "We define ourselves by the wound they gave us." Identity as trauma.

1.1.7.Name: Civil War
1.1.7.Definition: "One of us must die." The logic of elimination.

1.2.1.Name: Status Zero
1.2.1.Definition: "I am nothing." The loss of role/job/dignity.

1.2.2.Name: The Vagrant
1.2.2.Definition: "I have no name/address." Humans with no legal or physical standing.

1.2.3.Name: Criminalized
1.2.3.Definition: "My existence is illegal." Laws against being poor/homeless.

1.2.4.Name: No Man's Land
1.2.4.Definition: Living in the camp, the border zone, the place that is not a place.

1.2.5.Name: Alienation
1.2.5.Definition: "I feel like a stranger in my home." Psychic displacement.

1.2.6.Name: Rootlessness
1.2.6.Definition: "I come from nowhere." Severed from ancestors/land.

1.2.7.Name: Exile
1.2.7.Definition: "I am cast out." Physical expulsion from the tribe.

1.3.1.Name: Helplessness
1.3.1.Definition: "Nothing I do matters." The collapse of Agency.

1.3.2.Name: Suicide
1.3.2.Definition: "I must end the Who." Active destruction of the self.

1.3.3.Name: Silence
1.3.3.Definition: "I have no voice." The cessation of culture/art.

1.3.4.Name: Sterility
1.3.4.Definition: "No life here." Refusal to reproduce in this space.

1.3.6.Name: Fatalism
1.3.6.Definition: "It was meant to be." Surrender to Doom.

1.4.1.Name: Echo Chamber
1.4.1.Definition: Listening only to the Self reflected back.

1.4.2.Name: The Hermit
1.4.2.Definition: Physical isolation. "No one is with me."

1.4.3.Name: Distrust
1.4.3.Definition: "I cannot rely on you." The breakdown of social method.

1.4.4.Name: Transaction
1.4.4.Definition: "The Market is everywhere." Relationships reduced to price.

1.4.7.Name: Anomie
1.4.7.Definition: "There are no norms." Chaos of the soul.

1.5.1.Name: The Libel
1.5.1.Definition: Defining the Enemy via lies (e.g. "They eat children").

1.5.2.Name: The Purge
1.5.2.Definition: Physically removing the "Who" labeled as Enemy.

1.5.3.Name: Witch Hunt
1.5.3.Definition: The public spectacle of finding the Enemy.

1.5.5.Name: Projection
1.5.5.Definition: Blaming the Enemy for own sins.

1.5.7.Name: Sacrifice
1.5.7.Definition: Killing the Enemy to save the State (Magical Thinking).

1.6.1.Name: THE TROJAN HORSE
1.6.1.Definition: "The Ruler is a Spy." The Leader serves the Enemy.

1.6.2.Name: Influence
1.6.2.Definition: "Their ideas are here." Adopting Enemy narratives.

1.7.1.Name: Fiat
1.7.1.Definition: "My Word is Law." Definition via Will.

1.7.2.Name: Force
1.7.2.Definition: "I rule because I am Strong." Police State.

1.7.3.Name: Emergency
1.7.3.Definition: "Crisis allows me to do this." Permanent Exception.

1.7.5.Name: The Cult
1.7.5.Definition: "I am God." Worship of the Leader.

1.7.6.Name: The Purge
1.7.6.Definition: Eliminating rivals to secure the Chair.

2.1.1.Name: Incommensurability
2.1.1.Definition: The inability to define value or truth across the divide. Language breaks down; words mean opposite things to each side.

2.1.2.Name: Demonization
2.1.2.Definition: Defining the Other not as "Wrong" but as "Evil/Unreal." They are NPCs or demons, removing the moral obligation to treat them as human.

2.1.3.Name: Propaganda
2.1.3.Definition: The manufacturing of a synthetic reality (The Narrative) to replace organic truth. Information is weaponized to define "What is true."

2.1.4.Name: The Filter Bubble
2.1.4.Definition: The physical/digital separation of data-space. One literally never encounters a definition that contradicts the Tribe's reality.

2.1.5.Name: Cynicism
2.1.5.Definition: The belief that Truth is impossible, so one might as well choose the most convenient Lie.

2.1.6.Name: Conspiracy
2.1.6.Definition: Defining all events as the result of a secret, malevolent plot. The rejection of randomness or error.

2.1.7.Name: Cold War
2.1.7.Definition: The mental state of total hostility. Shared reality is annihilated; total bifurcation of the "What."

2.2.1.Name: Nullification
2.2.1.Definition: The refusal to recognize the definition of the Central Law. "That law does not exist here."

2.2.2.Name: Disloyalty
2.2.2.Definition: Transferring the definition of Authority from the State to the Local Chief/Warlord.

2.2.3.Name: Decree
2.2.3.Definition: The Law is defined simply by the Will of the Ruler ("Because I said so"). It loses its objective structure.

2.2.4.Name: Secession
2.2.4.Definition: Redefining the border. "The Law stops here." The physical contraction of the legal space.

2.2.5.Name: Illegitimacy
2.2.5.Definition: Defining the Ruler as fake/fraudulent, thus voiding all their laws.

2.2.6.Name: Usurpation
2.2.6.Definition: Claiming the title was stolen in the past, making the current definition void.

2.2.7.Name: Anarchy
2.2.7.Definition: The absence of any definition. No one knows "What" the rules are.

2.3.1.Name: Doubt
2.3.1.Definition: The deliberate manufacture of uncertainty. "We don't know What it is." Stalling action via confusion.

2.3.2.Name: Denial
2.3.2.Definition: Rejecting the definition because it comes from Them. "If they say X, X is false."

2.3.3.Name: The Power Lie
2.3.3.Definition: Lying not to deceive, but to demonstrate power over the definition of reality. "It is true because I say it is."

2.3.4.Name: Relativism
2.3.4.Definition: "Truth depends on where you stand." The rejection of objective fact for subjective narrative.

2.3.5.Name: Nihilism
2.3.5.Definition: The rejection of the concept of Truth itself. "Nothing is true, everything is permitted."

2.3.6.Name: Gaslighting
2.3.6.Definition: Rewriting the past definition to make the victim question their sanity. "That never happened."

2.3.7.Name: Delusion
2.3.7.Definition: The population lives in a fantasy world unrelated to physical parameters.

2.4.1.Name: Speculation
2.4.1.Definition: Defining value as "What the next person will pay." The economy becomes a casino/bet.

2.4.2.Name: Subsistence
2.4.2.Definition: Value is reduced to "Staying Alive." The total collapse of surplus and complex trade.

2.4.3.Name: Counterfeiting
2.4.3.Definition: The proliferation of fake value. "How is it made?" It's not real.

2.4.4.Name: Barter
2.4.4.Definition: Value only exists "Here and Now" in physical goods (cigarettes, bullets).

2.4.5.Name: Unknown
2.4.5.Definition: The Price Mechanism fails. No one knows "Why" it costs X. Allocation chaos.

2.4.6.Name: Short-Termism
2.4.6.Definition: Value is defined only in the immediate moment. No investment in the future.

2.4.7.Name: Debasement
2.4.7.Definition: The Ruler dilutes the definition of the coin, stealing wealth from all holders.

2.5.1.Name: Selective Justice
2.5.1.Definition: "Show me the man, I'll show you the crime." The definition of crime becomes fluid/weaponized.

2.5.3.Name: Indictment
2.5.3.Definition: Using the process of charging as the punishment itself.

2.5.4.Name: Seizure
2.5.4.Definition: Taking the property/land of the rival. Justice defined as looting.

2.5.5.Name: Vengeance
2.5.5.Definition: The court exists to inflict pain, not to restore balance.

2.5.6.Name: Breach
2.5.6.Definition: Breaking the historical definition/norm (Precedent) to win the current round.

2.5.7.Name: Tyranny
2.5.7.Definition: The Law is defined simply as the Will of the Strongest.

2.6.1.Name: Deadlock
2.6.1.Definition: The system acts to stop itself. "What is done?" Nothing. Functional paralysis.

2.6.2.Name: The Mob
2.6.2.Definition: The definition of power moves from the Institution to the Crowd (Force).

2.6.3.Name: Martial Law
2.6.3.Definition: The State is defined by the Gun. Suspension of civil definition.

2.6.4.Name: Dual Power
2.6.4.Definition: Two Capitols, Two Kings. The definition of the Center is split.

2.6.5.Name: Panic
2.6.5.Definition: The fear that the Definition (Order) is dissolving into Void.

2.6.6.Name: The Coup
2.6.6.Definition: Seizing the definition of the State illegal means.

2.6.7.Name: Dictatorship
2.6.7.Definition: The State is defined as One Man.

2.7.1.Name: Vetoed
2.7.1.Definition: We cannot define our own policy. A foreign power holds the pen.

2.7.2.Name: The Occupier
2.7.2.Definition: The Enemy defines the rules on our soil.

2.7.3.Name: Vassalage
2.7.3.Definition: We act as a Puppet. We execute the Will of Another.

2.7.4.Name: Debt Slavery
2.7.4.Definition: Our resources go "There" (to the Creditor). We do not own our output.

2.7.5.Name: Inferiority
2.7.5.Definition: We define ourselves as lesser than the Empire. Cultural cringe.

2.7.6.Name: Assimilation
2.7.6.Definition: We are eaten. Our definition merges into Theirs.

2.7.7.Name: Extinction
2.7.7.Definition: The Nation ceases to sustain a definition. It disappears from the map.

3.1.1.Name: Price Blindness
3.1.1.Definition: We don't know "What" it costs anymore. Inflation destroys signal.

3.1.2.Name: Starvation
3.1.2.Definition: The people ("Who") cease to eat. Biological failure.

3.1.5.Name: Panic
3.1.5.Definition: Buying because of fear. Run on goods.

3.1.7.Name: Autarky
3.1.7.Definition: Closing the border. No trade come in.

3.2.1.Name: Jurisdiction Clash
3.2.1.Definition: "What law applies here?" Conflict of Sovereigns.

3.2.2.Name: Infiltration
3.2.2.Definition: The Enemy is inside the border.

3.2.3.Name: Language Death
3.2.3.Definition: We speak Their tongue here now.

3.2.7.Name: Annexation
3.2.7.Definition: The Map changes. We are gone.

3.3.1.Name: Austerity
3.3.1.Definition: Cutting "What" we need to pay the debt.

3.3.2.Name: Peonage
3.3.2.Definition: We work for the Bank, not ourselves.

3.3.3.Name: Tribute
3.3.3.Definition: Paying protection money to the Empire.

3.3.5.Name: Shame
3.3.5.Definition: The humiliation of being a beggar nation.

3.3.6.Name: Usury
3.3.6.Definition: Interest that can never be repaid. Trap.

3.3.7.Name: Default
3.3.7.Definition: Total credit collapse. Expulsion from system.

3.4.1.Name: Obsolescence
3.4.1.Definition: "What is this?" It is old junk. Outdated tech.

3.4.6.Name: Ruins
3.4.6.Definition: Living in the wreckage of the past.

3.5.1.Name: Rent-Seeking
3.5.1.Definition: Charging for access to "What" was free.

3.5.2.Name: Enclosure
3.5.2.Definition: Fencing off the land meant for All.

3.5.3.Name: Corruption
3.5.3.Definition: Selling the public asset to a crony.

3.5.5.Name: Greed
3.5.5.Definition: "Because I want it." Private gain > Public good.

3.5.7.Name: Neo-Feudalism
3.5.7.Definition: Society divides into Owners and Renters.

3.6.1.Name: Smuggling
3.6.1.Definition: Trade moves to the dark. Contraband.

3.6.2.Name: Scarcity
3.6.2.Definition: "Who" has it? No one. Lack of goods.

3.6.4.Name: Blockade
3.6.4.Definition: Physical ring of steel. Nothing comes in.

3.6.5.Name: Victimhood
3.6.5.Definition: "They did this to us." External blame.

3.7.4.Name: Barter
3.7.4.Definition: Value is in the physical object here.

3.7.5.Name: Anxiety
3.7.5.Definition: Value is fleeing. Fear of zero.

4.1.1.Name: Justification
4.1.1.Definition: "Pain is necessary." Using logic/science to explain why cruelty is good.

4.1.3.Name: Hate Speech
4.1.3.Definition: Naming the victim as vermin to bypass empathy.

4.1.5.Name: Sadism
4.1.5.Definition: "Because I enjoy it." Pleasure derived from suffering.

4.1.6.Name: The Cycle
4.1.6.Definition: "They did it to us." Repeating the trauma loop.

4.1.7.Name: Evil
4.1.7.Definition: Alignment with pure destruction vs Life.

4.2.2.Name: The Ghetto
4.2.2.Definition: "They belong There." Physical containment of the unclean.

4.2.3.Name: The Slur
4.2.3.Definition: Normalizing derogatory language to strip dignity.

4.2.4.Name: Disenfranchised
4.2.4.Definition: Stripping the right to speak/vote in "This Place."

4.2.6.Name: Scapegoating
4.2.6.Definition: Blaming the Other for the failures of the Self.

4.2.7.Name: Ethnostate
4.2.7.Definition: The goal of total racial purity.

4.3.1.Name: Double Standard
4.3.1.Definition: One set of rules for Rulers, another for Ruled.

4.3.2.Name: Luxury
4.3.2.Definition: The Leaders feast while the People starve.

4.3.3.Name: Gaslighting
4.3.3.Definition: Denying the privilege to the face of the poor.

4.3.4.Name: Immunity
4.3.4.Definition: The Law does not apply "Up Here."

4.3.7.Name: Decadence
4.3.7.Definition: The rot of the elite collapses the structure.

4.4.1.Name: Market Fundamentalism
4.4.1.Definition: "Price is the only Value." Commodification of all life.

4.5.1.Name: Treason
4.5.1.Definition: Lending aid and comfort to the Enemy.

4.5.3.Name: Denunciation
4.5.3.Definition: Reporting family/friends to the Secret Police.

4.5.4.Name: Selling Out
4.5.4.Definition: Trading national interest for foreign cash.

4.5.5.Name: Perfidy
4.5.5.Definition: Acting in bad faith to gain advantage.

4.5.7.Name: Apostasy
4.5.7.Definition: Abandoning the Creed/Faith of the nation.

4.6.1.Name: Neutrality
4.6.1.Definition: "Good and Evil are equal." Refusal to judge.

4.6.2.Name: Inaction
4.6.2.Definition: Standing by while another is killed.

4.6.3.Name: Silence
4.6.3.Definition: Refusing to speak up against power.

4.6.4.Name: The Bystander
4.6.4.Definition: Watching the crime from the sidelines.

4.7.4.Name: The Bunker
4.7.4.Definition: Hiding to survive the coming doom.

4.7.6.Name: Paranoia
4.7.6.Definition: "It is all a plot against me."

4.7.7.Name: Submission
4.7.7.Definition: "I obey to stay safe." Police State.

5.1.1.Name: Anti-Expertise
5.1.1.Definition: Purging the "Knower." Replacing skill with loyalty. Defining expertise as a threat.

5.1.2.Name: Incompetence
5.1.2.Definition: The Idiot rules. The basic inability to perform the functions of office.

5.1.3.Name: Cronyism
5.1.3.Definition: Promoting friends regardless of "How" well they perform.

5.1.4.Name: Kleptocracy
5.1.4.Definition: The budget goes "There" (to the Ruler's pocket). State as piggy bank.

5.1.5.Name: Malice
5.1.5.Definition: Ruling to hurt. Active hatred of the population.

5.1.6.Name: Nepotism
5.1.6.Definition: Power flows through the bloodline, not merit.

5.1.7.Name: Madness
5.1.7.Definition: The Executive mind is broken/insane. Chaos ensues.

5.2.1.Name: The Veto
5.2.1.Definition: One voice can say No, blocking the Will of the Many.

5.2.2.Name: Shutdown
5.2.2.Definition: No one works. The machinery of state halts.

5.2.3.Name: Red Tape
5.2.3.Definition: The process is the punishment. Forms/Rules prevent action.

5.2.4.Name: The Filibuster
5.2.4.Definition: The bill dies Here. Minority obstruction.

5.2.5.Name: Obstruction
5.2.5.Definition: Blocking for spite/political gain, not policy.

5.2.6.Name: Delay
5.2.6.Definition: Waiting out the clock. Justice delayed is justice denied.

5.3.1.Name: Classified
5.3.1.Definition: "You cannot see What we do." Over-classification to hide incompetence.

5.3.2.Name: Black Site
5.3.2.Definition: "Who is there?" No one. Secret prisons where law does not exist.

5.3.3.Name: Newspeak
5.3.3.Definition: Speaking to confuse. Using words to hide meaning rather than reveal it.

5.3.4.Name: Dark Money
5.3.4.Definition: "Where did the cash come from?" Unknown. Secret funding of power.

5.3.5.Name: Distrust
5.3.5.Definition: Assuming the people are the enemy. The Secret List.

5.3.6.Name: The Cover-Up
5.3.6.Definition: Creating a meta-crime to hide the original crime.

5.3.7.Name: Shadow State
5.3.7.Definition: Real power operates invisibly (Deep State/Intel Agencies).

5.4.1.Name: Quid Pro Quo
5.4.1.Definition: "This for That." Use of office for personal exchange.

5.4.2.Name: Pay-to-Play
5.4.2.Definition: Access is sold to the highest bidder (Donor).

5.4.3.Name: Bribery
5.4.3.Definition: Cash for outcome. The direct purchase of the State.

5.4.4.Name: Lobbying
5.4.4.Definition: Law is written "There" (in the Corporation's office).

5.4.5.Name: Mercenary
5.4.5.Definition: Loyalty is rented, not owned. Fighting for money.

5.4.6.Name: The Spoils
5.4.6.Definition: "To the victor go the spoils." Looting the state after winning.

5.4.7.Name: Kleptocracy
5.4.7.Definition: The State exists solely to facilitate theft.

5.5.1.Name: Deregulation
5.5.1.Definition: Removing the rules that protect life. "What rules?"

5.5.2.Name: Poisoning
5.5.2.Definition: Allowing the citizenry to be poisoned for profit.

5.5.3.Name: Capture
5.5.3.Definition: The Regulator is controlled by the Regulated.

5.5.4.Name: Revolving Door
5.5.4.Definition: Officials leave office to work "There" (for the companies they policed).

5.5.5.Name: Complicity
5.5.5.Definition: The State helps the Corporation kill/steal.

5.5.7.Name: Corp-State
5.5.7.Definition: The merger of State and Corporate power (Fascism).

5.6.1.Name: The Fraud
5.6.1.Definition: Business as deceit. The Contract is a trick.

5.6.2.Name: The Brute
5.6.2.Definition: The Strongest rules. Violence is the only vote.

5.6.4.Name: The Raid
5.6.4.Definition: Wealth is taken from "There" to "Here". Predation.

5.6.5.Name: Cruelty
5.6.5.Definition: Enjoying the pain of others. Sadism as status.

5.6.6.Name: Recruitment
5.6.6.Definition: Indoctrinating youth into violence. Child Soldiers.

5.6.7.Name: Warlordism
5.6.7.Definition: The State breaks into rival gangs.

5.7.1.Name: Doublethink
5.7.1.Definition: Holding two contradictory thoughts at once.

5.7.4.Name: The Bunker
5.7.4.Definition: Hiding from reality in a hole.

6.1.1.Name: Lost Cause
6.1.1.Definition: "We didn't lose, we were cheated." Reframing defeat.

6.1.2.Name: Fabrication
6.1.2.Definition: Inventing a divine origin for the Leader.

6.1.3.Name: The Textbook
6.1.3.Definition: Teaching lies to children to enforce loyalty.

6.1.7.Name: Chosen People
6.1.7.Definition: "God selected us." Divine right excuses crimes.

6.2.1.Name: Censorship
6.2.1.Definition: Removing the Event from the record.

6.2.2.Name: Book Burning
6.2.2.Definition: Destroying the physical carriers of memory.

6.2.3.Name: Silence
6.2.3.Definition: "We do not speak of it." Enforced forgetting.

6.2.4.Name: Iconoclasm
6.2.4.Definition: Smashing the statues/art of the past.

6.2.5.Name: Damnatio Memoriae
6.2.5.Definition: Striking the Name so they never existed.

6.2.6.Name: Whitewashing
6.2.6.Definition: Cleaning the blood history to look pure.

6.2.7.Name: Oblivion
6.2.7.Definition: Total cultural amnesia. Civilization forgets itself.

6.3.1.Name: Traditionalism
6.3.1.Definition: Rejecting the Modern for the Archaic.

6.3.2.Name: Re-enactment
6.3.2.Definition: Living in the past identity physically.

6.3.3.Name: Revival
6.3.3.Definition: Using dead language/symbols to signal purity.

6.3.4.Name: Restoration
6.3.4.Definition: Trying to put the old map back together.

6.3.5.Name: Grievance
6.3.5.Definition: "They stole our glory." Politics of sadness.

6.3.6.Name: Reaction
6.3.6.Definition: Moving Backward in time as policy.

6.3.7.Name: Stasis
6.3.7.Definition: Refusal to evolve or adapt. Petrified state.

6.4.2.Name: The Purge
6.4.2.Definition: Mass killing of the Scapegoat class.

6.4.3.Name: Witch Hunt
6.4.3.Definition: The public trial of the innocent.

6.4.5.Name: Projection
6.4.5.Definition: "They are doing what we are actually doing."

6.5.2.Name: Repetition
6.5.2.Definition: Doing the same fatal thing again.

6.5.6.Name: Short Attention
6.5.6.Definition: Inability to focus on long timeframes.

6.5.7.Name: Sleepwalking
6.5.7.Definition: Drifting into dooms hidden in the past.

6.6.5.Name: Fanaticism
6.6.5.Definition: Willingness to kill for the Idea.

6.7.5.Name: The Hero
6.7.5.Definition: "Only I know the truth." Gnostic pride.

7.1.2.Name: The Wall
7.1.2.Definition: Physical barriers to stop the world.

7.3.1.Name: Concession
7.3.1.Definition: Giving "What" they want to feed the beast.
